element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mechanical dragon assembly, form change mechanics
Increased mobility, enhanced shooting capability, new movement patterns

element_introduction_order.element: Boss encounters (including Babylon - three-headed mechanical dragon)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity with transformation milestone providing mechanical shift rather than true rest; horizontal scrolling maintains forward momentum while player manages simultaneous threats

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic enemy encounters with spaceship form; primary challenge is learning dodge mechanics in 3D field
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Obstacle density increases; ship transformation sequence introduces new mechanical layer; enemies begin coordinated patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Robot form faces sustained bullet/pattern pressure; boss encounters demand mastery of enhanced mobility; Babylon boss represents mechanical complexity peak
notable_spikes: Babylon boss encounter (three-headed dragon with multiple attack vectors)

notable_level_patterns.description: Early stages focus on assembling the spaceship into robot form while avoiding obstacles. Once transformation completes, gameplay shifts from avoidance-heavy to offense-heavy horizontal shooter mechanics.
Persistent obstacle environment requiring spatial awareness during horizontal scroll; obstacles serve as both hazard and rhythm delimiter
Stage concludes with major boss encounter (notably Babylon, three-headed mechanical dragon) testing accumulated skills in sustained pressure environment
